title: Portfolio Town
description: This site — a walkable Phaser 3 + Tiled portfolio with an NPC guide and six themed buildings.

title: FPGA Traffic Light Controller
description: A finite-state-machine traffic light controller implemented in Verilog and synthesized on a Cyclone FPGA.

title: Embedded Sensor Logger
description: Arduino-based multi-sensor data logger with SD card storage and a serial dashboard.

title: Real-Time Signal Visualizer
description: MATLAB tool for visualizing and filtering real-time signal data with adjustable FFT windows.

title: Task Tracker Web App
description: A full-stack task manager with drag-and-drop boards and team collaboration.

title: Python Automation Toolkit
description: A collection of scripts that automate repetitive data-cleaning and reporting tasks.

title: UART Communication Module
description: Custom UART transmitter/receiver core written and verified in Verilog with ModelSim testbenches.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A responsive weather dashboard consuming a public API with 5-day forecasts.

title: Line-Following Robot
description: An Arduino-driven line-following robot with PID-tuned motor control.

title: Portfolio API Backend
description: A small REST API that serves structured project/resume data (an earlier version of this site's data layer).
